status.description: The status of the version (whether it's untrained, training, trained, etc.).

total_input_count.title: number of inputs in the model version

pretrained_model_config.title:
When a model has already been trained externally, you can upload
it directly to the platform as a model version directly by
setting the PretrainedModelConfig

completed_at.description: When training of this version was completed.

visibility.description:
The visibility field represents whether this message is privately/publicly visible.
To be visible to the public the App that contains it AND the User that contains the App must
also be publicly visible.

app_id.description: The app the model version belongs to.

user_id.description: The user the model version belongs to.

modified_at.title: When this model version was last modified

metadata.title:
To handle arbitrary json metadata you can use a struct field:
https://github.com/google/protobuf/blob/master/src/google/protobuf/struct.proto

output_info.description:
Info about the model's output. Besides `output_info.data`, these fields should
be reserved for parameters that affect the models outputs when inferencing.
`output_info.data` is used to specify the training concepts for this model version.

input_info.description:
Info about preprocessing the models inputs, before they are sent to this model for training or inferencing.
E.g.: `input_info.base_embed_model` lets us know inputs should be ran through a base model before being sent to an embedding-classifier.

train_info.description: Configuration for the training process of this model version.

import_info.title:
Configuration used to import model from third-party toolkits
DEPRECATED: no longer support importing models from third party toolkits

train_log.title: Contains the training logs if available

inference_compute_info.description: The minimum required compute resource for this model for inference.

build_info.title: Build information for the model version

method_signatures.title: Model signature information for the model version

special_handling.description: List of special handling instructions for this model version.

num_threads.description: The number of threads to use for this model version.
